languages.text: {n}В голосе мертвеца слышится странное глумление.{/n} "А ты? Впрочем, ты и сам не знаешь ответ, особь".

traits.locale_text: {n}В голосе мертвеца слышится странное глумление.{/n} "А ты? Впрочем, ты и сам не знаешь ответ, особь".

languages.text: {n}The dead man's voice rings with peculiar mockery.{/n} "And what about yourself? Not that you know the answer, specimen."

languages.text: {n}Die Stimme des toten Mannes klingt mit eigenartigem Spott.{/n} "Und was ist mit dir? Nicht dass du die Antwort wüsstest, Exemplar."
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's voice rings with peculiar mockery.{/n} "And what about yourself? Not that you know the answer, specimen."

languages.text: {n}La voix du mort résonne d'une singulière moquerie.{/n} "Et qu'en est-il de vous ? Non pas que vous connaissiez la réponse, spécimen."
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's voice rings with peculiar mockery.{/n} "And what about yourself? Not that you know the answer, specimen."

languages.text: {n}死者的声音带着奇特的嘲弄。{/n}"那你自己呢？你不知道答案，标本。"
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's voice rings with peculiar mockery.{/n} "And what about yourself? Not that you know the answer, specimen."

languages.text: {n}La voz del muerto resuena con una burla peculiar.{/n} "¿Y qué hay de ti? No es que sepas la respuesta, espécimen".
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's voice rings with peculiar mockery.{/n} "And what about yourself? Not that you know the answer, specimen."

languages.text: {n}死者の声は独特の嘲笑を含んでいる。{/n}「あなた自身はどうなの？答えを知っているわけでもないだろう。
languages.original_text: {n}The dead man's voice rings with peculiar mockery.{/n} "And what about yourself? Not that you know the answer, specimen."

languages.text: {n}Ölü adamın sesi tuhaf bir alaycılıkla çınlıyor.{/n} "Peki ya sen? Cevabı bildiğinden değil, numune."
